headlines.headline: Brevon Microchips recalls products in data analytics line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: Withdrawing from a market, even due to unfavorable conditions, implies a loss of revenue stream and potential write-offs, negatively impacting Krevum Pharmaceuticals.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
